text.title: Solo Incident Triage Checklist Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid and one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator must reject.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "incident-2026-05-23-01", "version": "1.1.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "incident_id": "INC-2026-05-23-01", "detected_at": "2026-05-23T11:02Z", "owner": "@ruslan", "impact": "checkout flow 5xx ~12% requests", "containment_action": "rollback", "comms_sent_at": "2026-05-23T11:14Z", "root_cause": "Migration 0042 dropped index used by checkout query.", "corrective_actions": [ "restore index", "add migration-impact CI check" ], "blameless": true }
example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.

owner=team (r1); containment_action=forward-fix without containment first (r3); comms_sent_at empty (r2); missing artefact_id, version, last_reviewed, detected_at, impact, root_cause, corrective_actions.
